zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當William 'the Younger' Longespée於1207年12月8日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury31歲，母親Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury21歲。他於1216年與Idoine Camville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1240年登記服兵役。他去世於1250年2月8日在埃及الدقهلية艾爾 曼斯u拉享年42歲，埋葬在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ。

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William 'the Younger' Longespée于1207年12月8日出生在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury31岁，母亲Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury21岁。他于1216年与Idoine Camville结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1240年登记服兵役。他去世于1250年2月8日在埃及الدقهلية艾爾 曼斯u拉享年42岁，埋葬在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: 'the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant spelling of Ty or a transferred use of the surname, a local name for someone who lived by a common pasture, Middle English tye.

nameMeanings.name: Younger'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Northumberland and eastern Scotland): from Middle English yungre ‘younger’, comparative of Young , used to distinguish a younger man from an older man bearing the same personal name (typically, father and son). In one case, at least, however, the name is known to have been borne by an immigrant Fleming, and was probably an Americanized form of Middle Dutch jongheer ‘young nobleman’ (see Jonker ).
Americanized form of various cognate or like-sounding names in other languages, notably German   Junger   and   Junker  , or Dutch   Jonker  .

en.lifeSummary: When William 'the Younger' Longespée was born on 8 December 1207, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, was 31 and his mother, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, was 21. He married Idoine Camville in 1216. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1240. He died on 8 February 1250, in Al Manşūrah, Dakahlia, Egypt, at the age of 42, and was buried in Acre, Northern, Israel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William 'the Younger' Longespée est né le 8 décembre 1207, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Idoine Camville en 1216. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1240. Il est décédé le 8 février 1250, à Al Manşūrah, Dakahlia, Égypte, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Acre, Northern, Israël.

de.lifeSummary: Als William 'the Younger' Longespée am 8. Dezember 1207 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury 31 und seine Mutter Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury 21. Er hat 1216 Idoine Camville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1240 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 8. Februar 1250 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Al Manşūrah, Dakahlia, Ägypten und wurde in Acre, Northern, Israel begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William 'the Younger' Longespée è nato il il 8 dicembre 1207 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Idoine Camville nel 1216. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1240. Morì il 8 febbraio 1250, nel Al Manşūrah, Daqahliyya, Egitto, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Acre, Northern, Israele.

ja.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー
ja.Al Manşūrah, Dakahlia, Egypt: エジプトالدقهليةアル マンsuラ
ja.lifeSummary: William 'the Younger' Longespéeが1207年12月8日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyは31歳，母Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyは21歳であった。1216年にIdoine Camvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1240年に兵役登録をした。彼は1250年2月8日にエジプトالدقهليةアル マンsuラで42歳で死去し，イスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William 'the Younger' Longespée(이)가 1207년 12월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1216년 Idoine Camville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1240년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1250년 2월 8일 이집트 الدقهلية 앨 먼su라에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에 묻혔다.

mn.8 December 1207–8 February 1250: 1207 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 8–1250 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 8

pt.8 December 1207–8 February 1250: 8 de dezembro de 1207–8 de fevereiro de 1250
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William 'the Younger' Longespée nasceu em 8 de dezembro de 1207, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Idoine Camville em 1216. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1240. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1250, em Al Manşūrah, Dakahlia, Egipto, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Acre, Northern, Israel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William 'the Younger' Longespée родился 8 декабря 1207 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Idoine Camville в 1216 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1240 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 8 февраля 1250 г. в местности аль манsuрах, الدقهلية, Египет в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль.

es.8 December 1207–8 February 1250: 8 de diciembre de 1207–8 de febrero de 1250
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William 'the Younger' Longespée nació el 8 de diciembre de 1207, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Idoine Camville en 1216. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1240. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1250, en Al Manşūrah, Dakahlia, Egipto, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Acre, Northern, Israel.
